nasb.text: To the sons of Gershom were given, from the family of the half-tribe of Manasseh: Golan in Bashan with its pasture lands and Ashtaroth with its pasture lands;

esv.text: To the Gershomites were given out of the clan of the half-tribe of Manasseh: Golan in Bashan with its pasturelands and Ashtaroth with its pasturelands;

cnv.text: 又從瑪拿西半個支派的家族中，把巴珊的哥蘭和屬於哥蘭的草場，亞斯他錄和屬於亞斯他錄的草場，給了革順的子孫。

ccb.text: 革顺族从玛拿西半个支派中得到了巴珊的哥兰及其周围的草场，亚斯她录及其周围的草场。
